introSection: Hyper Coaster is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Land of Legends Theme Park in Antalya, Turkey. It is a clone of Flash at Lewa Adventure. The vertical loop wraps around the lift hill.
fullText:
Hyper Coaster is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Land of Legends Theme Park in Antalya, Turkey. It is a clone of Flash at Lewa Adventure. The vertical loop wraps around the lift hill.



Blue track with green supports.

The trains have lap-bar restraints.
